name: drive_counter
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int drive_counter(function<int(int)> f, vector<int> xs){ int last=0; for(int x: xs) last=f(x); return last; }

name: running_max_fn
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int last_running(function<int(int)> f, vector<int> xs){ int r=0; for(int x: xs) r=f(x); return r; }

name: memo_cube
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int sum_calls(function<int(int)> f, vector<int> xs){ int s=0; for(int x: xs) s+=f(x); return s; }

name: scan_with
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
vector<int> scan_with(function<int(int)> step, vector<int> xs){ vector<int> r; for(int x: xs) r.push_back(step(x)); return r; }

name: zip_with
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
vector<int> zip_with(function<int(int,int)> f, vector<int> a, vector<int> b){ vector<int> r; for(size_t i=0;i<a.size();i++) r.push_back(f(a[i],b[i])); return r; }

name: reduce_pairs
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int reduce_pairs(function<int(int,int)> op, int init, vector<int> xs){ int acc=init; for(int x: xs) acc=op(acc,x); return acc; }

name: make_adder
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
function<int(int)> make_adder(int x){ return [x](int y){ return x+y; }; }

name: sort_by
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
vector<int> sort_by(function<bool(int,int)> less, vector<int> v){ for(size_t i=0;i<v.size();i++) for(size_t j=i+1;j<v.size();j++) if(less(v[j],v[i])){int t=v[i];v[i]=v[j];v[j]=t;} return v; }

name: dispatch_two
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int dispatch_two(int which, function<int(int)> f, function<int(int)> g, int x){ return which==0 ? f(x) : g(x); }

name: tally_matches
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int tally_matches(function<int(int)> pred, vector<int> xs){ int n=0; for(int x: xs) n+=pred(x); return n; }

name: map_list
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
vector<int> map_list(function<int(int)> f, vector<int> xs){ vector<int> r; for(int x: xs) r.push_back(f(x)); return r; }

name: integrate_fn
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
double integrate_fn(function<double(double)> f, double a, double b, int n){ double h=(b-a)/n, s=0; for(int i=0;i<n;i++){ double x=a+(i+0.5)*h; s+=f(x)*h; } return s; }

name: fixed_point_float
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
double fixed_point_float(function<double(double)> f, double x, int iters){ for(int i=0;i<iters;i++) x=f(x); return x; }

name: find_boundary
cpp_unit:
#include <functional>
int find_boundary(function<int(int)> pred, int lo, int hi){ while(lo<hi){ int mid=(lo+hi)/2; if(pred(mid)) hi=mid; else lo=mid+1; } return lo; }
